description: End-to-end protein characterization: UniProt search, FASTA retrieval, NCBI BLAST similarity, KEGG pathway discovery, PSICQUIC interactions, and QuickGO annotations. Captures the full run as a text report.
rules: read-only — queries UniProt / NCBI BLAST / KEGG / PSICQUIC / QuickGO APIs, writes local files only
PROTEIN is a protein name or UniProt accession (e.g. ZAP70_HUMAN, P43403)
BLAST runs only when a contact email resolves from NCBI_EMAIL; otherwise that step is auto-skipped
the captured run is written to record_store as protein_report.txt
usage: Set PROTEIN (name or UniProt ID). Optionally set NCBI_EMAIL to enable the BLAST step. Output: protein_report.txt.
limitation: Needs the bioservices Python package and internet access to UniProt/NCBI/KEGG/PSICQUIC/QuickGO. BLAST also needs NCBI_EMAIL and can take minutes. Offline / package-absent runs still produce protein_report.txt (degraded, may be empty).
